title: Avalon Online
body:
# Official Avalon Network Modpack  
![Avalon Banner](https://cdn.playavalon.net/assets/Discord_Banner_Still.png)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/388383662154055680?color=blue&label=For%20support%20join%20our%20discord&logo=Avalon&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/avalononline)

## Mod List:  
Sodium  
Iris Shaders  
Lithium  
Reese's Sodium Options  
Sodium Extra  
Plasmo Voice  
Sound Physics Remastered  
Skin Layers 3D (Fabric/Forge)  
Starlight (Fabric)  
Xaero's Minimap  
Xaero's World Map  
Cull Less Leaves  
YetAnotherConfigLib  
Entity Culling Fabric/Forge  
Dynamic FPS  
Enhanced Block Entities  
LazyDFU  
Animatica  
CIT Resewn  
Continuity  
Custom Entity Models  
Entity Texture Features  
Fabric API  
AdvancementInfo  
AntiGhost  
Better Mount HUD  
Borderless Mining  
Capes  
Cloth Config API  
Colormatic  
Debugify  
Fabric Language Kotlin  
Fabrishot  
FerriteCore  
Indium  
Item Model Fix  
LambDynamicLights  
Language Reload  
Main Menu Credits  
Memory Leak Fix  
MidnightControls  
Mixin Conflict Helper  
MixinTrace  
MoreChatHistory  
No Chat Reports  
No Fade  
OptiGUI  
Puzzle  
Smooth Boot (Fabric)  
Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR)  
Zoomify  
Hold That Chunk  
Mod Menu  
LambdaBetterGrass    
## Shaders included:
[Complementary shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/complementary-shaders)
